scripts.check:web: bun run bootstrap:web && bun run --cwd web check
scripts.ci: bun run verify && bun run test && bun run test:web
scripts.format:check:web: bun run bootstrap:web && bun run --cwd web format:check
scripts.format:web: bun run bootstrap:web && bun run --cwd web format
scripts.lint:web: bun run bootstrap:web && bun run --cwd web lint
scripts.test:web: bun install --cwd web --frozen-lockfile && bun run --cwd web test
scripts.verify: bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run spellcheck && bun run verify:web
scripts.verify:web: bun run bootstrap:web && bun run --cwd web format:check && bun run --cwd web lint && bun run --cwd web check
